evals.expected_output: A code review using the specified markdown table for major issues and bullet points for minor issues.

assertions.name: Mentions Context Gathering
assertions.description: The output explicitly mentions reading or fetching the file for context.

assertions.name: Uses Major Issue Template
assertions.description: The output uses the exact markdown table template with all 7 fields for a major security issue.

assertions.name: Uses Minor Issue Format
assertions.description: The output uses the simplified bulleted list for a minor maintainability issue.
